rules.condition: planted_tree_count > 5000

rules.label: 재식 거리 - 열간(세로)
rules.condition: if spacing is unknown, measure 3 rows and divide by 2

rules.label: 재식 거리 - 주간(가로)
rules.condition: one tree area can be calculated as row_spacing_m ? tree_spacing_m

rules.label: 과수 세부 품종
rules.condition: use only when detailed cultivar is known

rules.label: 재배 수형
rules.condition: training system options may differ by crop

rules.label: 개화 시작일 - 올해
rules.condition: bloom start means about 10 percent flowers open

rules.label: 개화 시작일 - 전년
rules.condition: bloom start means about 10 percent flowers open

rules.label: 개화 시작일 - 평년
rules.condition: bloom start means about 10 percent flowers open

rules.label: 만개기 - 올해
rules.condition: full bloom means about 80 percent flowers open

rules.label: 만개기 - 전년
rules.condition: full bloom means about 80 percent flowers open

rules.label: 만개기 - 평년
rules.condition: full bloom means about 80 percent flowers open

rules.label: 만개기 - 올해
rules.condition: full_bloom_current_date < bloom_start_current_date

rules.label: 만개기 - 전년
rules.condition: full_bloom_previous_date < bloom_start_previous_date

rules.label: 만개기 - 평년
rules.condition: full_bloom_normal_date < bloom_start_normal_date

rules.label: 착화량 - 전년 대비
